name: ai-agent-skills
description: Open AI Agent Skills, Claude skills, and Codex skill directory pages from VS Code-compatible editors.

commands.title: AI Agent Skills: Open Submit Page

scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if(p.displayName!=='AI Agent Skills') throw new Error('displayName'); if(!fs.readFileSync('src/extension.js','utf8').includes('https://aiagentskills.net/skills/')) throw new Error('links'); console.log('ok')"
